---
title: "Data Visulaization Talks and  Events"
---



## Porto Data Visualization Workshop  
*December 2020 (with BPLIM and Banco de Portugal)*

I co-organized this 2-day workshop bringing together leading experts in data visualization, including **Alberto Cairo**, **Yan Holtz**, **Chiara Sotis**, and **Christophe Hurter**. A dedicated training session was also organized for participants.

The videos of this event are online. See the [program](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Papers/WS_BPLIM2020_DataViz_Program_Site.pdf).

### Keynote

**Alberto Cairo** (University of Miami)  
*How to Make Decisions in Data Visualization*  
[Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Papers/BancoDePortugal2020.pdf)  
[Video](https://youtu.be/IDs4InpQ0Zw?list=PLUZo4TFBklMYZhiVPzuV_Oxaqay2WbQIM)

![](images/porto/alberto_cairo.png){width=150px}

---

### Talks

**Christophe Bontemps**  
*How to Lie With Graphics*  
[Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Papers/Part1-HowToLie.pdf)  
[Video](https://youtu.be/_hCsnF5R9Bk)

![](images/porto/how_to_lie.png){width=150px}

---

### Workshops

**Yan Holtz (Datadog)**  
*From Data to Visualization*  
[GitHub](https://github.com/holtzy/Talk)  
[Video](https://youtu.be/cfFgQxD7grY?list=PLUZo4TFBklMYZhiVPzuV_Oxaqay2WbQIM)

![](images/porto/yan_holtz.png){width=150px}

---

**Christophe Hurter (ENAC)**  
*Data-Driven Storytelling and Emerging Presentation Technologies*  
[Video](https://youtu.be/3sLHgBfwLoE?list=PLUZo4TFBklMYZhiVPzuV_Oxaqay2WbQIM)

![](images/porto/hurter.png){width=150px}

---

**Chiara Sotis (LSE)**  
*The scale of COVID-19 graphs affects understanding, attitudes, and policy preferences*  
[Paper](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Papers/Chiara%20SotisPaperLSE.pdf)  
[Video](https://youtu.be/FEMnNQKpv1o)

![](images/porto/sotis.png){width=150px}

---

## #hackaviz2020  
*March 2020*

Co-organized with Toulouse DataViz. Despite COVID-19, the contest gathered 37 contributions and was fully online.

- [All submissions](http://toulouse-dataviz.fr/resultats-hackaviz-2020)  
- [Live Twitch recording](https://vimeo.com/401537326)

![](images/hackaviz/twitch.jpg){width=300px}

---

## How to Lie with Graphics  
*2019–2020 (MIAT, ENS Lyon, SMART-LERECO)*

A structured seminar series on misleading graphics and visual distortions.

- [MIAT slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/HowToLie-Short.pdf)  
- [ENS Lyon slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/HowToLie-Short-ENS.pdf)  
- [SMART-LERECO slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/HowToLie-Short-SMART.pdf)

![](images/howtolie/miat1.jpg){width=250px}
![](images/howtolie/miat2.jpg){width=250px}

---

## Comment mentir avec des graphiques ?  
*October–December 2019*

Presented at Fête de la Science and Toulouse DataViz Meetup.

- [Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/Mentir6.pdf)  
- [Meetup slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/HowToLie-Meetup.pdf)  
- [Video](https://vimeo.com/381895600)

![](images/mentir/poster.jpg){width=200px}
![](images/mentir/caussade.jpg){width=300px}

---

## How to Lie with Graphics  
*March 2019, Bordeaux*

Invited seminar on the “dark side” of data science.

- [Slides](https://framadrive.org/s/nWZsk8XMx5XNfxX#pdfviewer)  
- [Video](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/HowToLieFinal/HowToLieFinal.html)

![](images/howtolie/sketchnote.jpg){width=150px}
![](images/howtolie/video.jpg){width=300px}

---

## Tools: The Vistorian & The Bertifier  
*January 2019*

Presentation of two tools from the AVIZ team.

- [Slides](https://speakerdeck.com/alaino/the-vistorian-and-the-bertifier)  
- [Video](https://vimeo.com/310955855)

![](images/tools/vistorian.jpg){width=350px}

---

## Selected Talks (2017–2018)

### Data Visualization for Data Scientists  
- [Slides](https://speakerdeck.com/toulousedatascience/number-26-la-data-visualisation-pour-la-data-science-et-les-data-scientists)  
- [Video](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/DataViz4DataScience/MeetupTDS/MeetupTDS.html)

![](images/talks/tds.jpg){width=350px}

---

### Shiny is Good for You!  
- [Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/MeetupShiny.pdf)

![](images/talks/shiny.jpg){width=300px}

---

### Everybody’s Got to Cheat Sometimes  
- [Blog](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/Everybody-got-to-cheat-sometimes.nb.html)  
- [Video](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/Cheating/Cheating.html)

![](images/talks/cheating.jpg){width=350px}

---

## Earlier Talks (2015–2017)

### Why You Should Never Use Radar Plots  
- [Blog](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/Why-you-should-never-use-radar-plots.nb.html)  
- [Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Blog/MeetupRadar.pdf)

![](images/radar/radar1.png){width=200px}
![](images/radar/radar2.png){width=200px}

---

### Maps and Networks  
- [Slides](https://fr.slideshare.net/ChristopheBontemps/meetup-maps-networks-why-and-how-to-visualize)  
- [Video](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/MapsAndNetworks/MapsAndNetworks.html)

![](images/maps/maps.jpg){width=350px}

---

### ENSAI 2016  
- [Code](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Ensai/Progs.zip)  
- [Data](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Ensai/Data.zip)  
- [App](https://xtophedataviz.shinyapps.io/NpReg/)

![](images/ensai/shinyreg.png){width=300px}

---

### Toulouse School of Economics  
- [Video](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/VideoLectureDataVisualisationTSE/LectureDataVisualisationTSE.html)  
- [Slides](http://data.visualisation.free.fr/Videos/VideoLectureDataVisualisationTSE/VisualizationGTFood.pdf)

---

### Institut Mathématique de Toulouse  
- [Slides](http://perso.math.univ-toulouse.fr/les-cafes-de-l-imt/files/2014/09/VoirOuNePasVoir.pdf)
